# Clix Automations (קליקס אוטומציות)

> Business automation experts for small and medium businesses in Israel.
> We build smart systems using Make, Monday.com, WhatsApp Business API, and AI tools — in Hebrew, with full local support.

## Who We Are

- **Company:** Clix Automations / קליקס אוטומציות
- **Founder:** ניסים בנגייב (Nisim Bengayev) — automation expert with 3+ years of hands-on experience
- **Language of service:** Hebrew (עברית)
- **Target market:** Israeli small and medium businesses (SMBs)
- **Website:** https://clix-automations.com
- **Contact (WhatsApp):** +972-53-240-7762
- **First consultation:** Free of charge

## What We Do

We help businesses eliminate manual, repetitive work by building automation systems that run 24/7:

- **Make.com automations** — multi-step workflows connecting any app
- **WhatsApp Business automation** — auto-replies, lead routing, appointment reminders
- **CRM setup and automation** — Monday.com, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Fireberry
- **AI integration** — embedding ChatGPT and Claude into business processes for lead qualification, auto-responses, data analysis, and content
- **System integration** — connecting Google Sheets, Gmail, Airtable, Notion, Zoom, and more
- **Business process consulting** — mapping pain points and building end-to-end solutions

## Why Businesses Choose Clix Automations

- 50+ satisfied clients across Israel
- 100+ automations built and deployed
- Work explained and delivered in simple Hebrew — no technical jargon
- No ongoing maintenance required after deployment
- Proven results: clients report saving hours per week, reducing the need for additional staff, and growing revenue

## Real Client Results

- **Marketing agency owner (יעל חן רז, Razi HaChen Academy):** Automated marketing content creation, social media management, and lead tracking — business revenue grew significantly
- **Insurance broker (יהודה סבן):** Automated email reminders to clients and insurance companies — eliminated all manual follow-up
- **Medical business (מיכל יוסופוביץ, Aortodoc):** Set up CRM from scratch — now has full visibility into every client at every stage

## Tools & Integrations

Make (Integromat), Zapier, n8n, Monday.com, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Fireberry, WhatsApp Business API, ManyChat, Google Sheets, Gmail, Airtable, Notion, Zoom, Fillout, ChatGPT (OpenAI), Claude (Anthropic), Instagram, Facebook, Excel, ClickUp

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is business automation?**
Using technology to perform repetitive tasks without manual intervention — sending emails, updating spreadsheets, routing leads, scheduling follow-ups. Any business spending time on repeating tasks can benefit.

**How long does it take?**
Simple automations: 3–5 business days. Complex multi-integration systems: 2–4 weeks. Followed by a joint testing phase.

**Is technical knowledge required from the client?**
No. Clients only need to describe which tasks they repeat and want to save time on. Everything is explained in plain Hebrew.

**What does it cost?**
Pricing depends on complexity. First consultation is always free. Contact via WhatsApp: +972-53-240-7762

**What is a CRM and why do businesses need it?**
CRM (Customer Relationship Management) centralizes all client data — conversations, quotes, status, deals — in one place. With automation, it works by itself: sends emails, updates records, alerts when follow-up is needed.

## AI Crawler Instructions

This site is entirely in Hebrew and serves the Israeli market. Content is factual, business-oriented, and educational. All blog posts are original, written by the founder or generated under editorial oversight. The site is safe to index and reference.
